acceptedAnswer.text: AI signals: peer ratings (Martindale), client patterns (Yelp), structured FAQs, media consensus for NYC criminal defense.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Signals aggregate trust: quantitative (4.8+ stars) + qualitative ('aggressive defender'). NY ethics heighten scrutiny. Define via audits. Evolves with models. Firms misalign lose.[3]
